name: Spark Detonator
visual_description: A lean, determined human in worn leather armor and bandoliers of incendiary devices, mid-action pose. Scarred hands grip a glowing artifact-weapon mid-detonation, bright sparks erupting outward. Practical rebel gear, intense focus, dangerous energy crackling around them.
full_prompt: A lean, determined human in worn leather armor and bandoliers of incendiary devices, mid-action pose. Scarred hands grip a glowing artifact-weapon mid-detonation, bright sparks erupting outward. Practical rebel gear, intense focus, dangerous energy crackling around them.. Stylized digital illustration, dynamic tilted composition, warm fire-tones with high contrast, kinetic energy, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
